{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/91620858?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Rootingg", "id": 91620858, "login": "Rootingg", "node_id": "U_kgDOBXYF-g", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Rootingg", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42549", "cvss": {"score": 4.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Summary
The `make:controller` CLI command calls `mkdir(..., recursive: true)` on a path built from the user-supplied controller name, **before** Nette's class-name validation runs. The class-file write is correctly rejected by Nette when the name contains `/`, but the recursive directory creation side effect is already committed — including directories located outside the project root through `../` traversal.

### Affected code
`flight/commands/ControllerCommand.php` (≈ 63-66):

```php
if (is_dir(dirname($controllerPath)) === false) {
    $io->info('Creating directory ' . dirname($controllerPath), true);
    mkdir(dirname($controllerPath), 0755, true);   // un-normalized, runs before validation
}
```

### Proof of concept
```
$ php vendor/flightphp/runway/runway make:controller '../../../../tmp/CONTROLLER_TRAVERSAL_TEST/pwn'
Creating directory .../app/controllers/../../../../tmp/CONTROLLER_TRAVERSAL_TEST
Nette\InvalidArgumentException: Value '../../../../tmp/CONTROLLER_TRAVERSAL_TEST/pwnController' is not valid class name.

$ ls /home/user/tmp/CONTROLLER_TRAVERSAL_TEST
(directory exists — created before the exception was thrown)
```

### Impact
- **Arbitrary directory creation outside the project root**, executable by any local actor that can run the Flight CLI (developer machine, shared CI build agent, compromised dev container).
- Primes log-file planting for chained LFI exploitation (e.g. creating a directory where an attacker can later drop a `.php` file to be included via a distinct template-include weakness).
- On Windows, the `\` separator opens additional traversal surface.

### Patch (fixed in `3.18.1`, commit `b8dd23a`)
The controller name is now normalized with `basename()` and validated against `^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$` before any `mkdir` side effect runs.

### Credit
Discovered by **@Rootingg**.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00154, "percentile": 0.04867}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3xjv-pmf2-gf2q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T21:34:39Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3xjv-pmf2-gf2q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3xjv-pmf2-gf2q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42549"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-13T20:16:21Z", "published_at": "2026-05-06T21:34:39Z", "references": ["https://github.com/flightphp/core/security/advisories/GHSA-3xjv-pmf2-gf2q", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42549", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3xjv-pmf2-gf2q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/flightphp/core/security-advisories/GHSA-3xjv-pmf2-gf2q", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/flightphp/core", "summary": "Flight has path traversal in `make:controller` CLI that creates arbitrary directories outside project root", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:40:00Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3xjv-pmf2-gf2q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.18.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "flightphp/core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.18.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Flight has path traversal in `make:controller` CLI that creates arbitrary directories outside project root
